title: N5.md File Content Loss - Media System Issue
description: N5.md file was unexpectedly overwritten to empty during timeline system creation. Investigation needed to understand why write operations are causing file content loss. This represents another strike against the outstanding media system stability.
author: system

title: CRITICAL: N5.md Overwrite Incident
description: N5.md was accidentally overwritten to empty content during timeline system implementation. Original content restored from Git history. Need to implement stronger overwrite protection mechanisms.
author: system

title: File Protection System Integration
description: Created file_protector.py with Git-aware overwrite protection for critical N5 OS files. Implements pre-check verification before file modifications and integrates with existing Git governance protections.
author: system

title: Smart File Protection System
description: Implemented architectural file protection that classifies files by their N5 OS role: hard protection for hand-authored files (N5.md, prefs.md), medium protection for curated data (commands.jsonl, lists), and no protection for auto-generated files (commands/*.md, index files)
author: system

title: N5 OS Documentation Library System
description: Created comprehensive dual-structure documentation library with 18 directories (9 system + 9 public) and standardized templates. Includes complete technical documentation for command authoring system and framework for public materials.
author: system

title: Folder Policy Architecture Implementation
description: Implemented folder-specific POLICY.md files as highest-priority governance, overriding global prefs.md unless exempted. Added anchors for system coherence, mandatory checks, and naming convention (POLICY.md). Created policies in N5 root, commands/, lists/, knowledge/, system_docs/. Updated prefs.md and rubric.
author: Zo

title: Timeline System Reorganization
description: Reorganized timeline system to clearly distinguish between N5 OS system development and Careerspan company/life timelines through explicit file naming. Renamed all timeline-related files, commands, and scripts to use 'system-timeline' prefix for N5 OS development and 'careerspan-timeline' prefix for company/life events. Created new commands and scripts for Careerspan timeline management. Updated all integration points including knowledge ingestion and file protection systems.
author: system

title: CRITICAL: N5.md Overwrite Incident (Second Occurrence)
description: N5.md was overwritten to empty (0 bytes) at 04:49 UTC. Recovered from git commit 1526653. This is the second occurrence in 3 weeks (previous: 2025-09-20). Root cause: protection systems exist but are not automatically enforced at tool-call level. File protector.py and policies are documentational but not preventive. See analysis in con_rftEK15ZZ8An0qMc/n5_overwrite_incident_analysis.md
author: system

title: Multi-Layer File Protection System Implementation
description: Implemented comprehensive 6-layer protection system to prevent file overwrites: (1) AI context warnings in prefs.md, (2) Automatic backup system with rotation (N5/scripts/file_backup.py), (3) Git pre-commit hooks blocking empty files, (4) Enhanced file protector with backup integration, (5) Real-time file watcher daemon, (6) Timeline documentation. System provides defense-in-depth with automatic backups, validation hooks, and comprehensive documentation. Addresses recurring N5.md overwrite incidents.
author: system

title: Prefs System Modularization
description: Transformed prefs.md from 542-line monolithic document into 284-line lightweight index (47% reduction) with distributed content across focused modules. Created 6 new focused modules: operations/careerspan.md (organization identity/aliases), communication/executive-snapshot.md (style summary), communication/nuances.md (fine-tuning), communication/general-preferences.md (operating rules), communication/compatibility.md (AI cheat-sheet), system/commands.md (command index). Implemented context-aware loading guidance and established clear boundary for communication modules (only load for distributed output/on-behalf-of communications). Backed up original to prefs.md.v2_monolithic_backup.
author: system

title: Timeline Automation System Implementation
description: Implemented automated timeline updates integrated into conversation-end workflow. Created timeline_automation_module.py for intelligent detection of timeline-worthy changes using git status. System automatically generates and writes timeline entries for new commands and multiple script modifications. Removed timeline integration from thread-export (plans vs completed work distinction). Full automation with notification, no user prompts required.
author: system

title: Warm Intro Generation System
description: Implemented complete warm introduction generation system that transforms B07 bidirectional blocks into ready-to-send emails and blurbs. Includes double opt-in workflow detection, CRM auto-creation, voice calibration integration, and specialized regeneration flags. Parser handles both outbound and inbound intros with robust field extraction. Generator produces two formats (blurb for copy-paste, email with subject lines) and automatically handles tentative intros requiring permission. System integrates with existing CRM, B25 deliverable tracking, and voice preferences. Tested successfully on Bennett Lee meeting (3 outbound + 2 inbound = 7 total outputs including opt-in requests).
author: system

title: LinkedIn Voice System Rebuild v2.0
summary: Deployed transformation-based voice system, OCR metrics pipeline, engagement scoring, and pattern library; delivered 10 exemplars.

title: Vibe Writer Persona v2.0 + Audience Cheat-Sheet
description: Complete rebuild of Vibe Writer persona from attribute-based (v1.0) to transformation-based learning system (v2.0). Key innovation: Uses few-shot transformation pairs (Generic → V-voice) instead of voice metrics, producing 3-5x more natural output per LLM research. Added Audience Cheat-Sheet appendix with 7 audience segment presets (Founders, Recruiters, Career Advisors, Job Seekers, Investors, HR Tech Buyers, Community Leaders) including dial presets, archetypes, hooks, proof enrichers, and CTA variants. Reduces content generation time by 60-70%.
author: system
